programme.title: Sunday Today With Willie Geist
programme.desc: Sharp conversational coverage of the week's news, along with in-depth profiles of the people and personalities shaping American culture, assessing the highs and lows of the week and looking ahead to the next one.

programme.title: Open House NYC
programme.desc: Host Sara Gore presents a guide to upscale real estate in and around the Big Apple. In addition to a look at the hottest homes on the market, the show also provides interior design tips from specialists and a wealth of information on renovation and stylish living.

programme.desc: Interviews with public figures and those making news, setting the political agenda and spotlighting the impact Washington decision-making has on Americans.

programme.title: Live: Premier League Soccer
programme.desc: Manchester City (19-7-5) hosts Arsenal (21-7-4) at Etihad Stadium. A City win shrinks the gap to three points with a game in hand, putting the title in its hands. An Arsenal win extends the lead to nine, likely securing their first title since 2004.

programme.title: Live: Premier League Goal Zone
programme.desc: The best moments from the weekend in Premier League action.
